free_text: Fission induced in heavy elements by carbon, nitrogen
and oxigen nuclei.
English translation
English translation
Measurements were performed both
inside the cyclotron chamber as well as with external
ion beam at a distance of 12 m from the cyclotron.
The targets consisted of discs of either aluminum 4
microns thick or nickel 6 microns thick, coated with a
layer of the material being investigated (the diameter
of the coated area was 30 millimeters).
Accuracy of the absolute values of
cross sections depends mainly on the errors in
measuring the amount of material on the targets and
in the counting efficiency for the nitrogen ions.
New Reference code was added. Error
designation was changed. Sample description was
introduced. Data to sub 006, 007 were added.
The targets were prepared by diffusion of the metal
onto aluminum foil.
Statistical error
